name: WPS AI
description: Kingsofts WPS Office AI assistant and developer APIs for document, slide and table generation.

seo.title: WPS AI — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: WPS AI: Kingsofts WPS Office AI assistant and developer APIs for document, slide and table generation.

when_to_use: Generating and editing Office documents with integrated AI
Summarizing and analyzing spreadsheets with built-in LLM tools
Automating presentation creation from structured data in WPS
Building AI-assisted document workflows for Chinese enterprise

cons: API surface is secondary to the app
review.verdict: Compelling for WPS users in China, but it is not a general-purpose API most developers should adopt.
review.best_for: Chinese enterprises and users already standardized on WPS Office
review.not_for: Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace shops and non-Chinese workflows
